response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack craftsman with ~20 years of broad engineering experience, but the role requires director-level individual contributor caliber with recognized AI expertise, demonstrated AI products/platforms, and cloud/AI strategy fluency. The resume shows only light, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP tooling) without evidence of building or shipping AI products at scale, no advanced degree in an AI field, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud platform direction.
strengths: 20+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, public talks and workshops
concerns: No demonstrated AI products or platforms at the scale a Principal AI role demands
Lacks cloud platform strategy experience and senior advisory work with strategic customers
Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and scope are below director-level IC expectations

key_factors.factor: No cloud-platform strategy or executive advisory experience
